mapper.sql: id, task_id, file_id, file_type, ocr_type, ocr_raw_json, status, progress, result, error_message, tenant_id, created_at, completed_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recognition_task (task_id, file_id, file_type, ocr_type, ocr_raw_json, status, progress, result, error_message, tenant_id, created_at, completed_at) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{fileId}, #{fileType}, #{ocrType}, #{ocrRawJson}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{result}, #{errorMessage}, #{tenantId}, #{createdAt}, #{completedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM recognition_task WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
SELECT FROM recognition_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
SELECT FROM recognition_task WHERE status = #{status} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM recognition_task WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
